system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Athletics against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

You raise your hands in the air and leap high, unleashing a powerful column of energy that sweeps away enemies before you and moves at targets freely for some time. On a Success you create a large pillar shaped column of energy, that moves and bends at your command, striking anything in its path. Each round it can plow through up to 10 targets per Rank of Qi as it zips through the field of battle. This does 1d10 Fire Damage per Rank of Qi and it lasts 1 round per Rank of Neigong. Cathartic: This does 1d10 Fire Damage per Rank of Qi plus 1 Extra Wound per Rank of Neigong to each target it strikes. It can strike 20 targets per Rank of Qi per round.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: This does 1d10 Fire Damage per Rank of Qi plus 1 Extra Wound per Rank of Neigong to each target it strikes. It can strike 20 targets per Rank of Qi per round.
